title: helenium aschersonianum
intro: Helenium aschersonianum, also known as the Sneezeweed, is a flowering plant species in the sunflower family native to Europe and Asia. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant qualities, which have been traditionally used to treat respiratory issues and skin conditions. The health benefits of Helenium aschersonianum include its ability to relieve congestion, reduce fever, and soothe digestive issues, making it a valuable herbal remedy. Helenium aschersonianum can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in herbal medicine to support respiratory health and alleviate symptoms associated with colds and flu.
